property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:/spring framework//plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_25.0.2.v20260203-1141/jre/bin/server;C:/spring framework//plugins/org.eclipse.justj.openjdk.hotspot.jre.full.win32.x86_64_25.0.2.v20260203-1141/jre/bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Users\vaio\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\vaio\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\src\flutter\bin;C:\dart-sdk\bin;C:\Users\vaio\.dotnet\tools;C:\spring framework;;.

testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
01:26:50.825 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.mundial.app.MundialApplicationTests]: MundialApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 01:26:50.981 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.mundial.app.MundialApplication for test class com.mundial.app.MundialApplicationTests 01:26:51.096 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.mundial.app.MundialApplicationTests]: MundialApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 01:26:51.098 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.mundial.app.MundialApplication for test class com.mundial.app.MundialApplicationTests 01:26:51.222 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
